```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/shared/abcjs-audio.css">

<style>
#ts-root {
  --pr:#2780e3; --br:#dee2e6; --bl:#e9ecef; --mu:#6c757d;
  --in:#212529; --sf:#fff; --bs:#f8f9fa;
  max-width:860px; margin:0 auto 2rem;
  font-family:var(--bs-font-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif); color:var(--in);
}
#ts-root .sq-card {
  background:var(--sf); border:1px solid var(--br); border-radius:.5rem;
  padding:1rem 1.15rem; margin:0 0 1rem; box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
}
#ts-root .sq-row { display:flex; gap:.5rem .75rem; align-items:flex-end; flex-wrap:wrap; }
#ts-root .sq-group { display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
#ts-root .sq-label {
  font-size:.78rem; color:var(--mu); font-weight:600;
  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.03em; margin-bottom:.25rem;
}
#ts-root select {
  padding:.35rem .6rem; font-size:.9rem; border:1px solid #ced4da;
  border-radius:.375rem; background:var(--sf); color:var(--in); height:auto;
}
#ts-root .sq-btn {
  padding:.35rem .7rem; font-size:.9rem; border:1px solid #ced4da;
  border-radius:.375rem; background:var(--sf); color:var(--in);
  cursor:pointer; line-height:1.5; white-space:nowrap;
}
#ts-root .sq-btn:disabled { opacity:.5; cursor:not-allowed; }
#ts-root .sq-paper {
  background:var(--sf); border:1px solid var(--bl); border-radius:.375rem;
  padding:.4rem .5rem; min-height:56px; margin-bottom:.75rem;
}
#ts-root .sq-paper svg { width:100% !important; height:auto !important; display:block; }
#ts-root .cell-bank { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:flex-end; gap:6px; margin-top:4px; }
#ts-root .cell-buttons { display:contents; }
#ts-root .cell-wrapper { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; }
#ts-root .cell-number { font-size:11px; color:var(--mu); margin-bottom:2px; margin-left:4px; }
#ts-root .cell-btn {
  background:var(--sf) !important; border:1px solid #ced4da !important;
  border-radius:.375rem !important; cursor:pointer !important;
  padding:2px !important; box-sizing:content-box !important;
  position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .12s, box-shadow .12s;
}
#ts-root .cell-btn:hover {
  border-color:var(--pr) !important; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(39,128,227,.15) !important;
}
#ts-root .cell-preview { pointer-events:none; }
#ts-root .cell-preview svg { display:block; }
#ts-root #abc-editor {
  display:block; box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; min-height:80px;
  padding:.4rem .5rem; font-family:monospace; font-size:.82rem;
  border:1px solid var(--br); border-radius:.375rem;
  background:var(--bs); color:var(--in); resize:vertical;
}
</style>

<script>
	let activeCells_ts = [];
	let synthControl_ts;
	let tsVisTranspose = 0;

	const MINOR_MODE_ts = /^(m|min|minor|aeo|aeolian|dor|dorian|phr|phrygian|loc|locrian)$/;
	const COLL_PAIRS_ts = {
		"major-stepwise": "minor-stepwise", "minor-stepwise": "major-stepwise",
		"major-I-V": "minor-i-V", "minor-i-V": "major-I-V"
	};

	function applyTonality_ts() {
		if (!window.Tonality) return;
		var r = Tonality.getResting();
		if (r == null) return;
		var mode = Tonality.getMode();
		var wantMinor = !!(mode && MINOR_MODE_ts.test(mode));
		var sel = document.getElementById("collection-selector-ts");
		var switched = false;
		if (sel && COLL_PAIRS_ts[sel.value]) {
			if (wantMinor !== /^minor/.test(sel.value)) {
				sel.value = COLL_PAIRS_ts[sel.value];
				switched = true;
			}
		}
		tsVisTranspose = r <= 6 ? r : r - 12;
		if (switched) {
			loadCollection_ts();
		} else {
			var editor = document.getElementById("abc-editor-ts");
			if (editor && editor.value.trim()) renderSequence_ts(editor.value, false);
			renderCellBank_ts();
		}
	}

	function indexToLetter(i) {
		return String.fromCharCode(65 + i);
	}

	function extractV1Notes(tuneAbc, stripChords) {
		let v1Line = "";
		tuneAbc.split("\n").forEach(function(line) {
			if (line.indexOf("[V: V1]") !== -1) v1Line = line;
		});
		v1Line = v1Line.replace("[V: V1]", "").trim();
		if (stripChords) v1Line = v1Line.replace(/"[^"]*"/g, "").trim();
		return v1Line;
	}

	function getCollectionKeyField_ts(collectionName) {
		const tuneBook = new ABCJS.TuneBook(patternObject[collectionName]);
		const match = tuneBook.tunes[0].abc.match(/^K:\s*(.+)$/m);
		return match ? match[1].trim() : "C";
	}

	function splitHeaderAndBody_ts(abcString) {
		const headerLines = [];
		let bodyLine = "";
		for (const line of abcString.split("\n")) {
			if (/^[A-Za-z]:/.test(line) || line.startsWith("%%")) {
				headerLines.push(line);
			} else if (line.trim() !== "") {
				bodyLine = line;
			}
		}
		return { headerLines, bodyLine };
	}

	function getStaffCenter_ts(svg, bbox) {
		const lines = Array.from(svg.querySelectorAll("path")).map(function(p) { return p.getBBox(); })
			.filter(function(b) { return b.height < 2 && b.width > bbox.width * 0.5; });
		if (lines.length === 0) return bbox.y + bbox.height / 2;
		const top = Math.min.apply(null, lines.map(function(b) { return b.y; }));
		const bottom = Math.max.apply(null, lines.map(function(b) { return b.y + b.height; }));
		return (top + bottom) / 2;
	}

	function loadCollection_ts() {
		const collectionName = document.getElementById("collection-selector-ts").value;
		const tuneBook = new ABCJS.TuneBook(patternObject[collectionName]);
		activeCells_ts = tuneBook.tunes.map(function(t) {
			return {
				abc: extractV1Notes(t.abc, false),
				preview: extractV1Notes(t.abc, true)
			};
		});
		renderCellBank_ts();
		clearSequence_ts();
	}

	function renderCellBank_ts() {
		const collectionName = document.getElementById("collection-selector-ts").value;
		const key = getCollectionKeyField_ts(collectionName);

		const container = document.getElementById("cell-buttons-ts");
		container.innerHTML = "";

		const entries = [];
		activeCells_ts.forEach(function(cell, i) {
			const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
			wrapper.className = "cell-wrapper";

			const numberLabel = document.createElement("span");
			numberLabel.className = "cell-number";
			numberLabel.textContent = indexToLetter(i);
			wrapper.appendChild(numberLabel);

			const button = document.createElement("button");
			button.type = "button";
			button.className = "cell-btn";
			button.setAttribute("aria-label", "Pattern " + (i + 1) + ": " + cell.preview);
			button.addEventListener("click", function() { appendCell_ts(i); });

			const preview = document.createElement("div");
			preview.className = "cell-preview";
			button.appendChild(preview);
			wrapper.appendChild(button);

			container.appendChild(wrapper);

			const abcString = "X:1\nM:none\n%%staffwidth 100\nK:" + key + "\n" + cell.preview;
			ABCJS.renderAbc(preview, abcString, { add_classes: true, visualTranspose: tsVisTranspose });

			const svg = preview.querySelector("svg");
			const bbox = svg.getBBox();
			const staffCenterY = getStaffCenter_ts(svg, bbox);
			entries.push({ button: button, svg: svg, bbox: bbox, staffCenterY: staffCenterY });
		});

		if (entries.length === 0) return;

		const marginX = Math.max.apply(null, entries.map(function(e) { return e.bbox.width; })) * 0.1;
		const halfHeight = Math.max.apply(null, entries.map(function(e) {
			return Math.max(e.staffCenterY - e.bbox.y, (e.bbox.y + e.bbox.height) - e.staffCenterY);
		}));
		const contentHeight = halfHeight * 2;
		const marginY = contentHeight * 0.10;
		const totalHeight = contentHeight + marginY * 2;

		entries.forEach(function(entry) {
			entry.button.style.width = (entry.bbox.width + marginX * 2) + "px";
			entry.button.style.height = totalHeight + "px";
			entry.svg.style.transform =
				"translate(" + (-entry.bbox.x + marginX) + "px, " + (totalHeight / 2 - entry.staffCenterY) + "px)";
		});
	}

	function appendCell_ts(index) {
		const editor = document.getElementById("abc-editor-ts");
		const { headerLines, bodyLine } = splitHeaderAndBody_ts(editor.value);

		let newBody = bodyLine.replace(/\s*\|\|\s*$/, "");
		newBody += (newBody ? " || " : "") + activeCells_ts[index].abc + " ||";

		renderSequence_ts(headerLines.join("\n") + "\n" + newBody, true);
	}

	function clearSequence_ts() {
		const collectionName = document.getElementById("collection-selector-ts").value;
		const key = getCollectionKeyField_ts(collectionName);
		const header = "X:1\n%%MIDI program 4 \nM:none\nK:" + key;
		renderSequence_ts(header + "\n", true);
	}

	function renderSequence_ts(abcString, userAction) {
		document.getElementById("abc-editor-ts").value = abcString;

		const abcOptions = { add_classes: true, visualTranspose: tsVisTranspose };
		const visualObj = ABCJS.renderAbc("paper-ts", abcString, abcOptions)[0];
		document.querySelector("#ts-root .midi").innerHTML = ABCJS.synth.getMidiFile(abcString);

		getSoundfontUrl().then(function(sfUrl) {
			return new ABCJS.synth.CreateSynth().init({
				visualObj: visualObj,
				options: { soundFontUrl: sfUrl }
			});
		}).then(function() {
			if (synthControl_ts) {
				synthControl_ts.setTune(visualObj, userAction).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
			}
		}).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
	}

	let editTimeout_ts;
	function editSequence_ts() {
		clearTimeout(editTimeout_ts);
		editTimeout_ts = setTimeout(function() {
			renderSequence_ts(document.getElementById("abc-editor-ts").value, true);
		}, 400);
	}

	function load_ts() {
		const selectCollection = document.getElementById("collection-selector-ts");
		for (const key in patternObject) {
			const option = document.createElement("option");
			option.textContent = key;
			option.value = key;
			selectCollection.appendChild(option);
		}

		const TS_CFG = window.TOOL_CONFIG || {};
		if (TS_CFG.collections && TS_CFG.collections.length)
			Array.from(selectCollection.options).forEach(function(o) { if (TS_CFG.collections.indexOf(o.value) === -1) o.remove(); });
		if (TS_CFG.lockCollections || selectCollection.options.length <= 1)
			(selectCollection.closest('.sq-group') || selectCollection).style.display = 'none';

		if (ABCJS.synth.supportsAudio()) {
			synthControl_ts = new ABCJS.synth.SynthController();
			synthControl_ts.load("#audio-ts", cursorControl_ts, {
				displayLoop: true, displayRestart: true,
				displayPlay: true, displayProgress: true, displayWarp: true
			});
		} else {
			document.querySelector("#audio-ts").innerHTML =
				"<div class='audio-error'>Audio is not supported in this browser.</div>";
		}

		loadCollection_ts();

		if (window.Tonality) {
			Tonality.onChange(function(st, src) { if (src !== "local") applyTonality_ts(); });
			applyTonality_ts();
		}

		document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
			const active = document.activeElement;
			const isTyping = active && (active.tagName === "TEXTAREA" || (active.tagName === "INPUT" && active.type !== "checkbox" && active.type !== "radio"));
			if (isTyping) return;
			if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey || e.altKey) return;

			const letterIndex = e.key.length === 1 ? e.key.toUpperCase().charCodeAt(0) - 65 : -1;
			if (letterIndex >= 0 && letterIndex < activeCells_ts.length) {
				appendCell_ts(letterIndex);
			}
		});
	}
</script>

<div id="ts-root">
	<div class="midi" style="display:none">MIDI</div>

	<!-- Playback controls -->
	<div class="sq-card">
		<div class="sq-row">
			<div class="sq-group">
				<span class="sq-label">Collection</span>
				<select id="collection-selector-ts" onchange="loadCollection_ts()"></select>
			</div>
			<div id="audio-ts"></div>
			<button type="button" class="sq-btn" onclick="clearSequence_ts()">Clear</button>
		</div>
	</div>

	<!-- Cell bank -->
	<div class="sq-card">
		<div class="cell-bank">
			<div class="cell-buttons" id="cell-buttons-ts"></div>
		</div>
	</div>

	<!-- Notation output -->
	<div id="paper-ts" class="sq-paper"></div>

	<!-- ABC editor -->
	<textarea id="abc-editor-ts" spellcheck="false" oninput="editSequence_ts()"></textarea>
</div>

<script src="/apps/shared/soundfont.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/abcjs-basic.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/patterns/pattern-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/tonality.js?v=4"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/cursor-synth.js"></script>
<script>
	const cursorControl_ts = new CursorControl();
	load_ts();
</script>
```
